shared.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, one letter and one digit.
shared.weakPasswordFallback: Password doesn't meet the requirements (at least 12 characters, a letter + a digit).

errors.oauthOnlyAccount: This email is registered via Google. Please log in with Google.

signup.heading: Sign up for SimpleCRM
signup.sentMessagePrefix: We've sent a verification email to
signup.sentMessageSuffix: Click the link to complete your registration.

resend.success: We've just sent you a new verification email.
resend.failed: Sending failed. Please try again shortly.

errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered with us. Log in, or reset your password.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot your password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter the email you usually log in with. We'll send you a link to set a new password.
forgotPassword.doneMessageSuffix: is registered with us, we've sent it a password reset link. The link is valid for 1 hour.

resetPassword.heading: Set a new password
resetPassword.tokenInvalid: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

errors.generic: Setting the password failed. Please try again.

verifyEmail.heading: Email verification
verifyEmail.needsPasswordSuffix: doesn't have a password set yet. Please choose one now — from now on you'll be able to log in with either Google or email.

errors.missingToken: Missing verification token in the link.
errors.invalidOrExpired: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new email.

trialExpiredGate.heading: Your trial period has ended.
trialExpiredGate.subheading: Continue by choosing a plan. Your data stays safe.
trialExpiredGate.billingHint: We'll use these details for the tax document. Filling them in is required to proceed to payment.
trialExpiredGate.enterpriseCta: Need more? Talk to us about an enterprise package.

errors.consentRequired: Please confirm your consent to recurring payments to continue.
errors.billingRequired: Please fill in the billing details.
errors.billingSaveFailed: Saving the billing details failed. Please try again.
errors.gatewayUnavailable: The payment gateway is unavailable, please try again shortly.

confirmation.heading: Thank you. We'll send you payment instructions.
confirmation.body: We'll email you an invoice and payment details. Once payment is received, we'll activate your account within 24 hours. In the meantime, you can export your data.

enterprise.body: Your enterprise subscription has ended. Talk to our sales team about renewing it.

contactDialog.heading: Contact the enterprise team
contactDialog.intro: Write us a few words about your needs. We'll get back to you shortly.
contactDialog.thanksBody: We'll get back to you by email within 24 hours.

errors.network: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
